evals.prompt: Roadmap ของ BROKEN_A แสดงข้อความว่างทุกรายการ ช่วยดูว่าเกิดอะไรขึ้นและแก้ไขให้หน่อย (ดูที่ project: /sessions/inspiring-kind-knuth/mnt/Omega project/investment-research เป็น Prometheus investment research project)
evals.expected_output: Claude runs the audit script, identifies that BROKEN_A has 'milestone' key instead of 'commitment', applies --fix to normalize the key in data.json, and verifies the fix
assertions: The issue is correctly identified as a roadmap key mismatch (milestone vs commitment)
BROKEN_A/data.json is updated so roadmap items use 'commitment' key instead of 'milestone'
The fix is verified by re-running the audit or checking the file

evals.prompt: Gantt chart ของ BROKEN_B ไม่แสดงผลและมี Mermaid syntax error ช่วยตรวจสอบและแก้ไข (ดูที่ /sessions/inspiring-kind-knuth/mnt/Omega project/investment-research)
evals.expected_output: Claude runs audit, explains that BROKEN_B has all null date_said values causing Mermaid parse errors, explains the Gantt will show 'ไม่มีข้อมูล timeline' which is the correct fallback, and confirms company.html already has the null-date guard
assertions: Audit script is run to diagnose the issue
Claude correctly identifies null date_said as root cause of Mermaid error
Claude checks company.html for the null-date filter in buildGanttSyntax
Claude explains that showing 'ไม่มีข้อมูล timeline' is correct behavior (not a bug to fix in data)
Claude does NOT delete or fabricate date_said values

evals.prompt: หน้า Overview tab ของ BROKEN_B ดูว่างเปล่า ไม่แสดงข้อมูลอะไรเลย ทั้งที่ data.json มีข้อมูลอยู่ ช่วยแก้ไข (project: /sessions/inspiring-kind-knuth/mnt/Omega project/investment-research)
evals.expected_output: Claude runs audit, confirms BROKEN_B has no 'overview' field, checks that company.html has the rich fallback implementation, and explains that the Overview tab will now show description + financials + latest note instead of a blank placeholder
assertions: Claude correctly identifies missing 'overview' field in BROKEN_B/data.json
Claude checks company.html for the renderOverviewPanel fallback (finSummary, descHtml, noteHtml)
Claude explains what the fallback will display (description, financials, latest note)
Claude does NOT hallucinate an overview object into data.json
